display_information.name: MOR Commander — OpenClaw
display_information.description: MOR Finance orchestrator: specialists, roundtable, GitHub events, route intelligence

assistant_view.assistant_description: MOR OpenClaw orchestrator. Spawns PnL, Risk, Liquidity, Ops specialists. Engineering intelligence — not daily PnL rollups.

suggested_prompts.title: Engineering roundtable
suggested_prompts.message: /mor_roundtable Pull GET /api/agents/context. All specialists follow up in thread.

suggested_prompts.title: Route quality
suggested_prompts.message: /mor_pnl Route quality scan — PRIORITIZE/RETIRE with confidence.

suggested_prompts.title: Smart router
suggested_prompts.message: /mor_router Rank routes by execution probability from smartRouter API.

suggested_prompts.title: GitHub events
suggested_prompts.message: /mor_github Status of mor-github-events channel and webhook feed.

slash_commands.description: MOR Finance intelligence (routes to main orchestrator)
MOR engineering snapshot — intelligence layer health (no revenue rollup)
All specialists — Slack thread with cross follow-ups
Engineering brief — ops, routes, risk, data quality
Ops / Health — API status and data freshness
Governance — proposals and voting posture
Full MOR review — spawn all specialists and synthesize
Route quality — opportunity scoring and route actions
Smart Router — execution-quality ranking by confidence
DD/Risk — borrow/lending health and safety alerts
Market observations — deployment tier classification
Liquidity Intelligence — pool depth and sizing
Capital Ladder — tier posture and allocation logic
Hermes — code review; MOR specialists respond
Hermes ↔ MOR full dialogue — specialists, mentor, synthesis
MOR Agents — Hermes and specialists collaborate
MOR Audit — code audit discussion by agents
MOR GitHub events channel status
MOR Suggestions — agent project improvement ideas
MOR Codefix — discuss fix and prepare PR template
